Search for "Claude by Anthropic in PowerPoint" in Microsoft AppSource. Search for "Claude by Anthropic in PowerPoint" in Microsoft AppSource. Deploy the add-in to your organization or specific users. Deploy the add-in to your organization or specific users. Share these instructions with your team: Microsoft's deployment guide . Share these instructions with your team: Microsoft's deployment guide . After installation, team members can open PowerPoint, activate the Claude add-in (from Tools > Add-ins on Mac or Home > Add-ins on Windows), sign in with their Claude credentials, and start working with their presentations. Important: Organizations that have disabled "Let users access the Office Store" may find that admin-deployed add-ins don't appear for users. To work around this, deploy using the manifest XML files provided below. Alternatively, download the manifest file to install For IT administrators deploying to multiple users: Step 1: Obtain the custom manifest Click this link to download the custom manifest XML file. Click this link to download the custom manifest XML file. Save this file to a secure location. Save this file to a secure location. Step 2: Access Microsoft 365 Admin Center Navigate to https://admin.microsoft.com Navigate to https://admin.microsoft.com Sign in with your admin credentials. Sign in with your admin credentials. Go to Settings > Integrated apps. Go to Settings > Integrated apps. Step 3: Upload the custom add-in Click "Upload custom apps" Click "Upload custom apps" Select "Office Add-in." Select "Office Add-in." Choose "I have a manifest file on this device." Choose "I have a manifest file on this device." Browse and select the Claude for PowerPoint manifest XML file. Browse and select the Claude for PowerPoint manifest XML file. Click "Upload." Click "Upload." Step 4: Assign users Choose your deployment scope: Entire organization : All users get access Entire organization : All users get access Specific users : Enter individual email addresses Specific users : Enter individual email addresses Specific groups : Select security groups or distribution lists Specific groups : Select security groups or distribution lists Just yourself : For admin testing only Just yourself : For admin testing only Step 5: Deploy Review deployment settings. Review deployment settings. Click "Deploy." Click "Deploy." Add-in will be available within minutes (may take up to 24 hours for full organization
